Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The flowers seem like they're about to wilt...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2138 0 0}Oh man, they look like they're about to die. That's kinda sad...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The flowers seem to be doing great.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2108 0 0}I don't really care about flowers, but it looks like someone really takes care of these ones.[n]{f 1 1}
